headline: Can Chipotle's High-Efficiency Equipment Rollout Lift Comps?
summary: CMG is rolling out high-efficiency kitchen gear to boost throughput, with early installs showing 200-400 bps comp lift and better satisfaction.

raw.headline: Can Chipotle's High-Efficiency Equipment Rollout Lift Comps?
raw.summary: CMG is rolling out high-efficiency kitchen gear to boost throughput, with early installs showing 200-400 bps comp lift and better satisfaction.

headline: McDonald's Value Focus Fails To Drive Results: Analysts Cut Forecasts On Cautious Outlook
summary: McDonald's stock dips after reporting Q1 results. Company warns of softness in April. Analysts cut PT but expect performance to improve.

raw.headline: McDonald's Value Focus Fails To Drive Results: Analysts Cut Forecasts On Cautious Outlook
